title: Fire Inspectors and Investigators
description: Inspect buildings to detect fire hazards and enforce local ordinances and state laws, or investigate and gather facts to determine cause of fires and explosions.

tasks.text: Prepare and maintain reports of investigation results, and records of convicted arsonists and arson suspects.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Testify in court cases involving fires, suspected arson, and false alarms.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Package collected pieces of evidence in securely closed containers, such as bags, crates, or boxes, to protect them.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Conduct inspections and acceptance testing of newly installed fire protection systems.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Analyze evidence and other information to determine probable cause of fire or explosion.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Photograph damage and evidence related to causes of fires or explosions to document investigation findings.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Inspect buildings to locate hazardous conditions and fire code violations, such as accumulations of combustible material, electrical wiring problems, and inadequate or non-functional fire exits.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Examine fire sites and collect evidence such as glass, metal fragments, charred wood, and accelerant residue for use in determining the cause of a fire.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Instruct children about the dangers of fire.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Conduct fire code compliance follow-ups to ensure that corrective actions have been taken in cases where violations were found.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Inspect properties that store, handle, and use hazardous materials to ensure compliance with laws, codes, and regulations, and issue hazardous materials permits to facilities found in compliance.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Write detailed reports of fire inspections performed, fire code violations observed, and corrective recommendations offered.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Identify corrective actions necessary to bring properties into compliance with applicable fire codes, laws, regulations, and standards, and explain these measures to property owners or their representatives.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop or review fire exit plans.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Inspect and test fire protection or fire detection systems to verify that such systems are installed in accordance with appropriate laws, codes, ordinances, regulations, and standards.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Coordinate efforts with other organizations, such as law enforcement agencies.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Attend training classes to maintain current knowledge of fire prevention, safety, and firefighting procedures.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Review blueprints and plans for new or remodeled buildings to ensure the structures meet fire safety codes.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Teach fire investigation techniques to other firefighter personnel.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Conduct fire exit drills to monitor and evaluate evacuation procedures.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Teach public education programs on fire safety and prevention.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Recommend changes to fire prevention, inspection, and fire code endorsement procedures.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Subpoena and interview witnesses, property owners, and building occupants to obtain information and sworn testimony.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Conduct internal investigation to determine negligence and violation of laws and regulations by fire department employees.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Test sites and materials to establish facts, such as burn patterns and flash points of materials, using test equipment.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Dust evidence or portions of fire scenes for latent fingerprints.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Arrange for the replacement of defective fire fighting equipment and for repair of fire alarm and sprinkler systems, making minor repairs such as servicing fire extinguishers when feasible.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Issue permits for public assemblies.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Supervise staff, training them, planning their work, and evaluating their performance.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop and coordinate fire prevention programs, such as false alarm billing, fire inspection reporting, and hazardous materials management.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
